data.content: Planned a medium-size implementation centered on a new live smoke harness for `POST /api/plans` and `GET /api/plans/:id` against a disposable worktree derived from `/Users/cartine/stitch`, so the validation uses a real Knots repo without polluting the main Stitch checkout. The plan calls for structural plan/wave/step/beat assertions, independent persistence checks via `kno show`, and categorized diagnostics that separate planner startup, beat-selection, persistence, and addressability failures. Child knots created: `foolery-37f1`, `foolery-5b0c`, and `foolery-c57a`.
